author: Chris McClendon
name: 11L LeakyReLU PerLayerLR LegalTTT 30ep
blurb: 11-layer depth-recurrence GPT with LeakyReLU(0.5)² (PR #518), per-layer LR for TTT (mlp.proj 3x, mlp.fc 0.5x, PR #481), intra-chunk cosine LR, VE128 (layers 9-10), Partial RoPE (16/64), legal score-first TTT (30ep SGD, freeze=2). 3-seed mean 1.13936 ± 0.0008. Trained on 4xA100.
